templates.name: New message notification (company)
templates.subject: New message from client

templates.body:
Greetings, {{fname}}

Reminder your move is tomorrow

Request #{{request_id}}

No action is required from you. This is just a reminder email, that we have your move confirmed and scheduled on {{move_date}}

Estimated mover’s arrival time : {{time_window}} 

The person named on the estimate must be present. Otherwise, a Power of Attorney form must be on file.

Please leave TV power cable(s) unpacked. Our crew has to verify TVs prior their journey. 

Please empty all drawers of all furniture and pack all miscellaneous items into boxes. Unplug all appliances. 

Please make sure to secure a parking space (34 foot long) next to your apartment/house.

Parking as close as possible to your home entrance makes moves more efficient and protects you from paying any associated parking tickets.

We cannot transport liquid.  Please do not pack any type of liquid, including but not limited to cleaning/laundry supplies and/or alcohol.
View Request Page

templates.name: Move Reminder (tomorrow)
templates.subject: Your move is tomorrow (just friendly reminder)

templates.body:
Greetings, {{fname}}

Thanks for considering {{company_name}} for your move!

First, a couple of things to take note of: 

 

      ✅ For future reference, your assigned request number is: #{{request_id}}

     

      ✅ We are fully licensed and insured with A+ BBB rating;

 

      ✅ Free furniture wrapping and protection materials.

Our process and what's next

STEP 1 - done

Quote Submitted

STEP 2

We are checking availability and will send you an email shortly

STEP 3

Book Your Move

Recent customers reviews:

View more reviews..
Google Review
"I used Brave Movers to move into my new apartment today and could not of asked for anything better. This was my first time using a moving company so I wasn’t sure what to expect but I will definitely be using Brave Movers for any future moves. Dimitry and the two other men he worked with were all so professional, had great communication throughout the day, and were very efficient. I got quotes from many companies and Brave Movers was by far the most affordable and listened to my needs. Overall great experience! "
Lilly Reding
Google Review
"I wanted to update my original post from 7 months ago - I have since recommended Brave Movers to 3 friends and they have all said how wonderful their company is. Thank you again for all your help! ***** I cannot say enough good things about my experience with Daniel and his team. They were extremely efficient and always in communication with me. They were professional, kind, and very prepared to help me with items I hadn’t even finished packing. I cannot recommend their services enough! Thank you Brave Movers!"
Elizabeth Healy

Backed by the {{company_name}} Happiness Guarantee!

Your happiness is our goal, we’ll work hard to make it right!
View Request Page

templates.name: Welcome email
templates.subject: Thank you for submitting a quote.

templates.body:
Greetings, {{client.fname}} 

REMINDER-YOUR MOVE IS SCHEDULED
IN 5 DAYS!

Request #{{request_id}}

No action is required by you, this is just a reminder email, that we have your move confirmed and scheduled on {{move_date}}

Estimated mover’s arrival time: {{time_window}}

The person named on the estimate must be present. Otherwise, a Power of Attorney form must be on file.

Please leave TV power cable(s) unpacked. Our crew has to verify TVs prior their journey. 

Please empty all drawers of all furniture and pack all miscellaneous items into boxes. Unplug all appliances. 

Please make sure to secure a parking space (34 foot long) next to your apartment.

Parking as close as possible to your home entrance makes moves more efficient and protects you from paying any associated parking tickets.

We cannot transport liquid.  Please do not pack any type of liquid, including but not limited to cleaning/laundry supplies and/or alcohol.
View Request Page

templates.name: Move Reminder (in 5 days)
templates.subject: Your move is in 5 days (just friendly reminder)

templates.body:
Greetings, {{client.fname}} 

ANY FLEXIBILITY WITH YOUR MOVING DATE?

Request #{{request_id}}

We are really sorry to inform you that we are booked out for the date (or time) requested.

 

Please let us know if you have any flexibility with your moving date  and we would be happy to accommodate your moving needs. Please contact our office at {{company_phone}}, so that we can check our availability again.
View Request Page

templates.name: Job is booked
templates.subject: Job is booked!

templates.body:
FLAT RATE MOVE SERVICE

Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: FLAT RATE
Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

PDate

{{move_date}}

Flat Rate

{{quote}}

Arrival Time window

{{time_window}}

Crew Size

{{crew_size}}
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance_desc}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Quote Details

Flat Rate

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

  • Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover - 3.00% processing fee will be applied. 
  • Cash 
  • Check - has to be agreed with the office prior to the move.
  • Invoice - 3.00% processing fee will be applied. 

 

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

 
 
Proceed to account page

templates.subject: Request Quote (Confirmed)

templates.body:
Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: LOCAL MOVING SERVICE
Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} men

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 

  • Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover - 3.00% processing fee will be applied. 
  • Cash 
  • Check - has to be agreed with the office prior to the move.
  • Invoice - 3.00% processing fee will be applied.

 

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

 
 
Proceed to account page

templates.name: Confirmed - Local Move
templates.subject: Request Quote (Confirmed)

templates.body:
LOCAL MOVE SERVICE
(Action Required)

Move Plan #{{request_id}}

Service Type: LOCAL MOVE
NOT CONFIRMED

To confirm, please visit your account page and press the button "Proceed to Reservation"
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} men

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}

{{packing_description}}
 

Moving Insurance

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote 

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.) 

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location. 
 

Forms of payment accepted:

 

💳  Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover (3.00% processing fee will be applied);

 

🏦  Cash or Check (has to be agreed with the office prior to the move);

 

📄  Invoice (3.00% processing fee will be applied);

 
PROCEED TO REQUEST PAGE

What is next?

 

  1. Once the request receives the status CONFIRMED, you will receive an email confirmation;
  2. 5 and 1 day before scheduled move date, you will receive an email from us, just a reminder of the approaching move date and if you have any questions, you can reply directly to that email and one of our moving specialists will help you;
  3. On the scheduled move date, our crew member will contact you at least 30 minutes before arrival to update their ETA;
  4. We deliver you a stress-free move.

Please feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at (617) 991-3552

\n

 

\n

    2. \n

Please feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at (617) 991-3552

templates.name: Not Confirmed - Local Move
templates.subject: Your Moving Quote is Ready for Review (Action Required)

templates.body:
LOCAL MOVE SERVICE
(Not Confirmed By Client)

Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: L
Not Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} men

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 


- Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover (3.00% processing fee will be applied). 


- Cash


- Check (has to be agreed with the office prior to the move).

 
PROCEED TO REQUEST PAGE

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

templates.subject: Request Quote (Not Confirmed)

templates.body:
LOCAL MOVE SERVICE
(Not Confirmed By Client)

Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE:

Not Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} mеn

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 


- Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover (3.00% processing fee will be applied). 


- Cash 


- Check (has to be agreed with the office prior to the move).

 
PROCEED TO REQUEST PAGE

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}} {{c

templates.name: Not Confirmed - Unloading Help
templates.subject: Request Quote (Not Confirmed)

templates.body:
LOCAL MOVE SERVICE
(Not Confirmed By Client)

Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: Moving & Storage
Not Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} mеn

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 


- Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover (3.00% processing fee will be applied). 


- Cash 


- Check (has to be agreed with the office prior to the move).

 
PROCEED TO REQUEST PAGE

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

templates.name: Not Confirmed Quote - Moving & Storage
templates.subject: Request Quote (Not Confirmed)

templates.body:
Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: LOADING HELP
Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} men

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 

 

  • Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover - 3.00% processing fee will be applied. 
  • Cash 
  • Check - has to be agreed with the office prior to the move.
  • Invoice - 3.00% processing fee will be applied.

 

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

 
 
Proceed to account page

templates.name: Confirmed - Loading Help
templates.subject: Request Quote (Confirmed)

templates.body:
LOCAL MOVE SERVICE
(Confirmed By Client)

Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: UNLOADING HELP
Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} man

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 


- Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover (3.00% processing fee will be applied). 


- Cash 


- Check (has to be agreed with the office prior to the move).

 

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

 
 
Proceed to account page

templates.name: Confirmed - Unloading help
templates.subject: Request Quote (Confirmed)

templates.body:
Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: MOVING & STORAGE
Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}

Hourly rate

${{hourly_rate}}/hour

Crew size

{{crew_size}} men

Travel time

{{travel_time}}

Est. total time

{{total_time}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

Estimated Quote

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual number of labor hours, travel hours and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: "Travel Time" is the travel time from our parking location to your pick up address and the travel from your delivery address back to our location.

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 

 

  • Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover - 3.00% processing fee will be applied. 
  • Cash
  • Check - has to be agreed with the office prior to the move.
  • Invoice - 3.00% processing fee will be applied.

 

 

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

 
 
Proceed to account page

templates.subject: Job is booked!

templates.body:
Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: LONG DISTANCE
Not Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Moving insurance

Limited liability coverage of up to $20,000.00 based on $0.60/lb per article
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

GRAND TOTAL

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual volume / weight of the shipment and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 

Cash
Certified Bankers Check (personal check will not be accepted)

 
PROCEED TO REQUEST PAGE

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

templates.subject: Request Quote (Not Confirmed)

templates.body:
Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: LONG DISTANCE
Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Moving insurance

Limited liability coverage of up to $20,000.00 based on $0.60/lb per article
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

GRAND TOTAL

{{quote}}

Your final price will be based on the actual volume / weight of the shipment and the actual usage of packing supplies and additional services (i.e. storage, crating, hoisting, shuttle services, express delivery, etc.)

 

Forms of payment accepted:

 

Cash
Certified Bankers Check (personal check will not be accepted)

 
Proceed to account page
 

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

templates.subject: Request Quote (Confirmed)

templates.body:
Move Plan #{{request_id}}

SERVICE TYPE: FLAT RATE
Not Confirmed
 

Client name

Phone

Email

{{fname}}

{{client_phone}}

{{client_email}}
 

Move date

{{move_date}}

Start time window

{{time_window}}
 

{{services}}
 

{{packing}}
 

Move Size

{{move_size_name}}

{{move_cbf}} cbf
 

Origin

{{origin_full}}

{{origin_stairs}}

Destination

{{dest_full}}

{{dest_stairs}}
 

Packing

Moving Insurance

{{packing_description}}

{{move_insurance}}
 

FLAT RATE

{{quote}}

This estimate is a fixed price proposal. Final cost of the move will not exceed the amount indicated under section FLAT RATE unless additional services have been performed by {{company_name}} or an authorized third party. All charges are subject to tariffs, rules and regulations in effect on date of actual move. 
 

Forms of payment accepted:

 


- Credit Card: Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover (3.00% processing fee will be applied). 


- Cash


- Check (has to be agreed with the office prior to the move).

 
PROCEED TO REQUEST PAGE

What is next ?

 

  • You will receive email notification before the move

  • On the move date you will receive a phone call from us before 30 minutes of arrival time

  • Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns at {{company_phone}}

templates.body:
Greetings, {{fname}}

We wanted to touch base about the preliminary estimate you have received a few days ago.

Simply put, we want to be your mover and we will work hard to earn your business. 

If you have any questions or wish to schedule your move, simply call us at {{company_phone}}, or send us a message from your request page.

First, a couple of things to take note of: 

 

      ✅ For future reference, your assigned request number is: #{{request_id}}

     

      ✅ We are fully licensed and insured with A+ BBB rating;

 

      ✅ Free furniture wrapping and protection materials.
View Request Page

Recent customers reviews:

View more reviews..
#testimonitals
"I highly recommend Brave Movers for anyone looking for top notch service and expertise in the Boston area. Daniel and his team are extremely knowledgeable, experienced and thorough. They worked quickly and carefully to execute a complicated move out of one apartment, and then to another apartment with skill and precision. "
Ivan R
#testimonitals
"Hired Brave movers for a within- state move and could not have been happier with their services. Had three guys, they were on time, worked straight through, and cared for my belongings with protective wrappings and blankets better than I had experienced with previous movers."
Christine Pignatiello

Our Process:

Step 1 (done)

Submit a Quote

Step 2

Check Availability

Step 3

Book Your Move

Backed by the {{company_name}} Happiness Guarantee!

Your happiness is our goal. If you are not happy, we’ll work to make it right!
View Request Page

events.name: New Request
events.description: By default, this email is automatically sent to the Client when a new Request is created and you want to provide your Client with an Estimated Quote.

events.name: No Activity on an Unconfirmed Request
events.description: By default, the system sends this Email when there is no activity on your Client’s Account Page for 2 days and when the status of a Request is Not Confirmed.

events.name: Your Move Was Yesterday
events.description: By default, this Email is sent to your Clients one day after the actual day of the move.

events.name: Your Move is Tomorrow
events.description: By default, this Email is sent to your Clients one day before the actual day of the move.

events.name: Your Move is in 10 days
events.description: By default, this Email is sent to your Clients 10 days before the actual day of the move.

events.name: Your Move is in 5 days
events.description: By default, this Email is sent to your Clients 5 days before the actual day of the move.

events.name: Reminder Reservation paid/not confirmed
events.description: By default, the system sends this Email one day after the reservation was paid NOT from a Client’s Account Page.

events.name: Confirmed
events.description: By default, two Emails are sent to your Client when you change the status Request from Pending, Reserved or Not Confirmed to Confirmed.

events.name: Not Confirmed
events.description: By default, two Emails are sent to your Client when you change the status Request from Pending to Not Confirmed.

events.name: Completed
events.description: Event fired when status of Request changes from Confirmed to Completed.

events.name: Expired
events.description: The aim of the Email is to warn your Client that their Request was automatically canceled because their Confirmation time has run out.

events.name: We are not available
events.description: By default, this Email will be sent to a Client when you change the status of a Request to We are not available.

events.name: Canceled
events.description: By default, this Email will be sent to a Client when you change the status of a Request to Canceled.

events.name: Send Invoice
events.description: Send invoice for request

events.name: Invoice Paid
events.description: This email will be sent after the invoice is paid

events.name: Send Invoice (Storage tenant)
events.description: Send invoice for storage tenant

events.name: Admin/Manager add message
events.description: New message was added by manager or admin

events.name: Client add message
events.description: New message was added by client

events.name: Client add message in storage tenant
events.description: New message was added by client

events.name: Manager add message in storage tenant
events.description: New message was added by client

events.name: Client calls human (request)
events.description: Client calls human manager in request chat

events.name: Client calls human (storage)
events.description: Client calls human manager in storage tenant chat

events.description: This email is automatically sent every 3 weeks since the request received the "hold" status
